title: Cloud Client
description: Cloud API client for CCJK services

errors.AUTH_ERROR: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials.
errors.RATE_LIMIT: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
errors.SCHEMA_MISMATCH: Response format validation failed. The server response does not match the expected schema.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Network connection failed. Please check your internet connection.
errors.TIMEOUT: Request timeout. The server did not respond in time.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Server error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.NOT_FOUND: Resource not found. The requested resource does not exist.
errors.API_ERROR: API request failed. Please check your request parameters.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Validation error. Please check your input data.
errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
